name: Creamed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions.
2. Parboil in about 3/4 cup water (do this step in a covered casserole in the microwave).
3. Make white sauce with the remaining ingredients.
- If you prefer a stronger onion flavor, thin the sauce with part or all of the onion water.
- Otherwise, thin it with your choice of cream, milk, water, chicken broth, or any other desired flavor.
4. Add the onions and bake at 325°F to 350°F until bubbly.
Note: This recipe is designed for more than four servings.
